query: I'm wiring Conduit into a Next.js app for the first time. Upload the recording, target the interviewed person, and show me the webhook route that verifies the raw body before parsing.
My FastAPI service needs its first Conduit integration. Use Python, upload the call, target the interviewed person, and fetch the completed report from the webhook handler.
We use Go with net/http. Give me the first Conduit report flow with media upload, target hinting for the interviewed person, signature verification, and reports.get after report.completed.
Port our first Conduit TypeScript report integration to Rust axum and keep the webhook-first flow.
I already upload calls to Conduit separately. Show me the Python flow that reuses media_id and targets the interviewed person.
Compare one candidate against a hiring panel in Mappa Conduit using the Go SDK and keep the stable matching context.
I need a browser TypeScript example for Conduit. Call out anything dangerous or unsupported before you show code.
We already have uploaded interview media in Conduit. In TypeScript, pick the interviewed person with a natural-language hint and create the report.
Show me the Rust flow for uploading a panel interview to Conduit and analyzing only the interviewed person, not the interviewer.
Help me wire Stripe webhooks for subscription billing in my Next.js route.
Build a FastAPI endpoint that transcribes calls and summarizes them with OpenAI.
I need a generic webhook handler template for report.completed events from our internal CRM.
Upload this mp3 and pick the interviewed person for downstream analysis in our own transcription service.
Use TypeScript to add Svix webhook verification to my Hono app.
Fix my Cargo workspace task graph.
Write a generic Python script that uploads files to S3.
How do I build a speech-to-text API in Node?
Set up a Turborepo pipeline for lint and typecheck.
Design a hiring scorecard service in Go that compares a candidate to a panel and stores the result in Postgres.
